Container.Name: roadlog
Container.Overview: Roadlog is a self-hosted vehicle fuel and expense tracker. Track fill-ups, expenses, consumption stats, and costs per vehicle. Includes CSV import, backup/restore, and multi-user support.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: fuel gas mileage car vehicle expense tracker mpg consumption fillup
Container.Changes:
## v0.2.0 - CSV import for expenses - Dashboard chart shows fuel vs expense breakdown - Auto-create DATA_DIR on startup
## v0.1.0 - Initial release

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Roadlog web interface.
